content: User↔Group many-to-many in ASP.NET Core Identity: Add a UserGroup junction entity with UserId (FK to AspNetUsers) and GroupId (FK to Groups table). Not using IdentityRole for groups — roles (Admin/DM/Player) remain per-group-scoped in the junction table or as separate fields. Pattern: UserGroupEntity { UserId, GroupId, Role } allows per-group role assignment. Add navigation from UserEntity to ICollection<UserGroupEntity>. Seed existing users into EuphoriaInn group on migration. EF config: .HasKey(ug => new { ug.UserId, ug.GroupId }). Junction table does not use IdentityUserRole<int> — custom entity giving more flexibility.
